title: More Sniffer Flowers
description: Sniffer Flowers, but there's More of them and they actually do something
body:
![MSF 1.5 the evil update title](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nikdo53/MoreSnifferFlowersFabric/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1-1.5/images/SpiceTitleRender.webp) ### Minecraft mod expanding upon the sniffer, adding entire new mechanics, while keeping it somewhat vanilla friendly ### Now with way more armor trims ### Also seemingly the only Minecraft Sniffer mod that still gets major updates 😎 ![Features](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nikdo53/MoreSnifferFlowersFabric/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1-1.5/images/MSF_Features.webp) ![Dawnberry vine, ambush and caulorflower gif](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nikdo53/MoreSnifferFlowersFabric/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1-1.5/images/FancyCurseforge.webp) - **Dawnberry vine** - A glowing vine that drops edible Dawnberries when picked. Originally from the leaked 1.20 screenshot, can be fed to the sniffer - **Ambush** - An Amber bearing bush. Amber drops several treasures such as a new armor trim, banner pattern and a throwable dragonfly, also has a small chance to drop sniffer seeds, making farming them easier - **Caulorflower** - A dyable decorational flower, growing in a unique zigzag shape, harvestable for a dye of its color

- **Bonmeelia** - Produces jars of bonmeel, usable on 3x3 grids of crops to make one giant cop - **Dyespria** - A colorable plant used to color other blocks / plants with the ability to paint multiple at a time ![giant crop drop spreadsheet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nikdo53/MoreSnifferFlowersFabric/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1-1.5/images/GiantCropDropsNew.webp) - **Cropressed crops** - Craft a cropressor by collecting all 5 pieces either from amber or the giant crops to cropress 16 crops into one, these can be as an armor trim material or in their respective oddity - **Bottle o'Extraction** - Use to extract all current effects into a bootle - **Rebrewing Stand** - Rebrew extracted potions into way stronger and longer-lasting variants ![FAQ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Nikdo53/MoreSnifferFlowersFabric/refs/heads/fabric/1.20.1-1.5/images/MSF_FAQ.webp) - **How do giant crops work??**
Spoiler Like this!
- **I followed your great instructions above, but giant crops still don't work!** Make sure that 1: the cops are fully grown, 2: there's enough space, 3: if you have the right click harvest mod, you need to be at least on 1.4.5 since it doesn't work previously - **How does (X) feature work** Either check the [Official Wiki](https://github.com/AbraXator/MoreSnifferFlowers/wiki) or ask on my discord server - **Will there be a port for (X) version** Currently maintained versions are: Fabric and Forge for 1.20.1, Neoforge for 1.21.1. Forge will be dropped completely after 1.20.1 ( Its kinda dead anyway imo and significantly worse than neo in every way) Fabric 1.21.1 will be developed after the release of the Create mod, since I need their porting tools For versions newer than 1.21.1 I honestly don't know but I wanna wait until they're more largely adopted (cuz 1.21 has been out for 8 months and nobody's playing it yet) - **Will there be a back-port for older versions (pre-1.20?)** Nobody asked this question but it'd be funny if they did - **Where can i get a resourcepack that fixes the "worst textures don't fit in game" bug?** [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/more-sniffer-flowers-3d) [![Join our discord](https://github.com/AbraXator/MoreSnifferFlowers/blob/1.20.1/curseforge/MSF_Discord.png?raw=true)](https://discord.gg/susFRftyRJ)
